title: matricaria suaveolens
intro: Matricaria suaveolens, also known as sweet scabious or lemon chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds and soothing irritated skin. The health benefits of Matricaria suaveolens include reducing anxiety and promoting a restful sleep, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and infusions, often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
